transcript.text: Hey, what's up? It's, uh, Living in Lafayette Vlog for the 22nd. It's the 23rd today, though, at 5.40 in the morning on Friday.
So, uh, I got up at, like, uh, 1 o'clock yesterday afternoon.

And then, I'm doing archeological sites, and I'll finish that tomorrow, and then I'll get going and doing all the other stuff.
Like Roman ruins and stuff like that. Roads and stuff.
And, yeah, I think I'll finish all of my, uh, the ones that are dated, or the bulk of the pictures that I have, all the stuff.
And I'll throw it in there before I move out.

Friday, and then Saturday.
